proposed_status_row.notes: First-pass extraction; OCR issues in shock notation and investment FOC; no runtime validation.

unresolved_issues: Investment adjustment-cost FOC should be checked against PDF because MinerU split the equation across displays.
Shock-process notation has OCR corruption around the production/technology-shock text.
Nonlinear steady-state level solution is not reconstructed beyond calibrated ratios and linearized zero-deviation convention.
No Dynare runtime validation was performed.
